# MCP Server Patterns

Use this skill when implementing a Model Context Protocol server, registering
tools, and connecting stdio transport for local agent clients.

## When to Use

- Build MCP tools.
- Add schema validation.
- Keep server transport thin.

See [template](templates/tool.md).
